result.summary: Identified two visual issues: a blank CTA button in the header and overlapping text at the bottom.

issues.description: The yellow action button in the top right corner of the header is completely blank without any text label.
issues.suggestion: Add the appropriate text label, such as 'Join' or 'Log In', to the button.

issues.description: The floating 'SCROLL DOWN' arrow element overlaps directly with the fine print disclaimer text at the bottom.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the padding or layout to ensure the disclaimer text remains fully legible.
